**Official websites use .gov**

A **.gov** website belongs to an official government organization in the United States.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3c?xml%20version=%271.0%27%20encoding=%27UTF-8%27?%3e%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27%20viewBox=%270%200%2064%2064%27%3e%3ctitle%3eicon-https%3c/title%3e%3cpath%20fill=%27%23719F2A%27%20fill-rule=%27evenodd%27%20d=%27M32%200c17.673%200%2032%2014.327%2032%2032%200%2017.673-14.327%2032-32%2032C14.327%2064%200%2049.673%200%2032%200%2014.327%2014.327%200%2032%200zm0%201.208C14.994%201.208%201.208%2014.994%201.208%2032S14.994%2062.792%2032%2062.792%2062.792%2049.006%2062.792%2032%2049.006%201.208%2032%201.208zm0%2018.886a7.245%207.245%200%200%201%207.245%207.245v3.103h.52c.86%200%201.557.698%201.557%201.558v9.322c0%20.86-.697%201.558-1.557%201.558h-15.53c-.86%200-1.557-.697-1.557-1.558V32c0-.86.697-1.558%201.557-1.558h.52V27.34A7.245%207.245%200%200%201%2032%2020.094zm0%203.103a4.142%204.142%200%200%200-4.142%204.142v3.103h8.284V27.34A4.142%204.142%200%200%200%2032%2023.197z%27/%3e%3c/svg%3e)

**Secure .gov websites use HTTPS**

A **lock ()** or **https://** means you’ve safely connected to the.gov website. Share sensitive information only on official, secure websites.
